title: Happy ghast and ghast origins
description: Adds happy ghast and normal ghast origin to the origins mod
body:
# More Origins
This mod adds the Happy Ghast and the Ghast origin to the world of origins



## Happy ghast:

The first origin in this mod is the happy ghast. It mainly has the ability to fly and other players can ride you

 

## Ghast:

when you chosse this origin you will have the same powers as the not so friendly friend in the nether named a ghast. You can for example fly are immune to lava and shoot fireballs

 

## Dependencies:

This mod requires that you have origins installed in your modfolder
